markdown:
#  Export Subcontractor Invoices as a Payor 
#####  General Availability in Select Markets (United States)
![Flag Us](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eb8f21ce49403a47d7bb5a0cedc7e0e9/7c0ec0977e654cc6bc9f3d8efa80fbe3/flag-us.png?fm=webp&h=14) [Procore Pay ](https://www.procore.com/pay) is available in the United States. It is designed for General Contractors and Owner-Builders who act as their own General Contractors on a job. Procore Pay extends the [Invoice Management](https://www.procore.com/invoice-management) functionality in the Procore web application to handle the payment process between general and specialty contractors.
###### Which Procore tool are you using?
When using Procore Pay to send payments, the appropriate user can export invoices from the Company Payments tool or the Project level Invoice Management tools.
#### Company Payments tool
Only a Payments Admin can export a list of invoices from the Company level Payments tool.
[Company Payments:](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payments-admin-guide/export-a-list-of-invoices)
#### Invoice Management Tools
Only an Invoice Administrator can export invoices from the project's Invoicing tool.
[Project Invoicing:](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/export-the-subcontractor-invoicing-page)
[Project Invoicing:](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/export-a-subcontractor-invoice)
## See Also
  * [About the Subcontractor Invoices Tab in the Payments Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/about-the-subcontractor-invoices-tab-in-the-payments-tool)
  * [Procore Pay - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/permissions)
  * [Procore Pay - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/permissions)


In Procore Pay, a _Payments Admin_ is a designated Procore user who administers the Company level Payments tool for that company's Procore account. Typically, one (1) or a small number of trusted users are designated to perform the tasks associated with this role.
An _Invoice Administrator_ is a person or group of people responsible for collecting, reviewing, and creating invoices in Procore. An invoice administrator can be any person in your organization (for example, a project manager, an accountant, or a team of bookkeepers) who have been granted the appropriate permissions to manage invoices on your contracts and/or fundings.
title: Export Subcontractor Invoices as a Payor
description: How to export subcontractor invoices using the available options for Procore's Invoice Management tools.
